name: Nexus3
tagline: Nexus is the world's first and only universal repository solution that's FREE to use. It supports Bower, Docker, Git LFS, Maven, npm, NuGet, PyPI, Ruby Gems,
description:
Nexus is the world's first and only universal repository solution that's FREE to use. It supports Bower, Docker, Git LFS, Maven, npm, NuGet, PyPI, Ruby Gems, 


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  nexus3:
    image: sonatype/nexus3:3.15.2
    volumes:
      - nexus3-data:/nexus-data
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment: {}
    ports:
      - 42078:8081
volumes:
  nexus3-data: null
